mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, task_name, task_group, trigger_type, execute_status, execute_start_time, execute_end_time, execute_duration, execute_result, error_message, retry_count, created_time FROM task_log WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY execute_start_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, task_id, task_name, task_group, trigger_type, execute_status, execute_start_time, execute_end_time, execute_duration, execute_result, error_message, retry_count, created_time FROM task_log WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY execute_start_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
